description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with exaggerated, angular limbs and a dynamic, crouched pose. The figure wears a long, loose-fitting coat over mesh-textured pants and a pair of classic lace-up sneakers. The head is adorned with medium-length, side-parted hair and sunglasses, giving a modern, urban vibe. The arms are dramatically extended backward, with sharp, wing-like extensions protruding from the sleeves, adding a surreal, avant-garde element. The overall form is slender, with elongated limbs and a slightly hunched posture, suggesting motion or readiness to leap. The surface appears matte with a mix of smooth and slightly textured areas, and the figure is visually striking due to its unconventional proportions and accessories.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in a crouched pose, wearing a long coat, mesh pants, sneakers, and sunglasses, with dramatic, angular arm extensions. The figure has a modern, urban appearance with exaggerated, dynamic features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face with sunglasses, the long coat, mesh pants, sneakers, and the dramatic, angular arm extensions.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the coat, and the extended, angular arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the coat's structure, and the full span of the wing-like arm extensions.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, the bent legs, and the sharp, backward-pointing arms.
attribute_clothing_type: long loose-fitting coat, mesh-textured pants, sunglasses
